inputs.label: Star Formation Rate (R*)
inputs.businessContext: Average rate of star formation in our galaxy

businessContext_i18n.en: Average rate of star formation in our galaxy

inputs.label: Fraction with Planets (fp)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of stars that have planetary systems

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of stars that have planetary systems

inputs.label: Habitable Planets per Star (ne)
inputs.businessContext: Average number of planets that can support life per star with planets

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of planets that can support life per star with planets
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gezegenli yıldız başına yaşamı destekleyebilecek ortalama gezegen sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl lebensfreundlicher Planeten pro Stern mit Planeten

inputs.label: Fraction where Life Appears (fl)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of habitable planets where life actually emerges

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of habitable planets where life actually emerges
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaşanabilir gezegenlerde yaşamın fiilen ortaya çıktığı oran
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil der bewohnbaren Planeten, auf denen tatsächlich Leben entsteht

inputs.label: Fraction where Intelligence Evolves (fi)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of life-bearing planets where intelligent life develops

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of life-bearing planets where intelligent life develops
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaşam barındıran gezegenlerde zeki yaşamın geliştiği oran
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil der Planeten mit Leben, auf denen intelligentes Leben entsteht

inputs.label: Fraction that Develop Technology (fc)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of civilizations that develop detectable technology

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of civilizations that develop detectable technology
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tespit edilebilir teknoloji geliştiren uygarlıkların oranı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil der Zivilisationen, die nachweisbare Technologie entwickeln

inputs.label: Lifetime of Civilization (L)
inputs.businessContext: Length of time such civilizations release detectable signals

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of time such civilizations release detectable signals
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bu tür uygarlıkların tespit edilebilir sinyaller yaydığı süre
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeitspanne, in der solche Zivilisationen nachweisbare Signale aussenden

formulas.N: R * fp * ne * fl * fi * fc * L
formulas.N___R___fp___ne___fl___fi___fc___L: N = R * fp * ne * fl * fi * fc * L

breakdown: N = R * fp * ne * fl * fi * fc * L
